---
name: 🌐 Whitelist Domain Request
about: Request a new domain to be added to the proxy whitelist
title: "[Whitelist] "
labels: whitelist
assignees: ""
---

## Protocol / Service
Name and URL of the protocol or service.

## Domains needed
List the exact domains that need to be whitelisted (check browser DevTools → Network tab):

```
.example.com
.api.example.com
```

## Category
- [ ] DeFi protocol
- [ ] RPC provider
- [ ] Block explorer
- [ ] Wallet service
- [ ] Bridge
- [ ] NFT marketplace
- [ ] Other: ___

## Chain(s)
Which blockchain(s)? (e.g., Ethereum, Solana, Arbitrum)

## Verification
Link to the official website or documentation confirming these are the correct domains.
